vision.heading: The Ummah Tech Vision
vision.lead: Ummah Tech is a growing community that seeks to nurture collaboration, inspire innovation, and build skills among Muslims in the technology sector, with the aim of benefiting the Ummah and humanity.

card.title: Technologists, founders & creatives
card.subtitle: A growing community across South Africa and beyond

paragraphs: We create spaces where Muslim technologists, founders, and creatives can come together to share ideas, learn from one another, and develop technology rooted in Islamic values. Together, we can take on the challenges facing our communities and the wider world.
Through this community, we believe ideas can grow into solutions – and solutions can drive meaningful change.

conference.heading: Ummah Tech Conference
conference.body: Our flagship event, the annual Ummah Tech Conference usually takes place in November, rotating between Johannesburg and Cape Town. It is a gathering of founders, technologists and innovators to network and share knowledge. Our goal is to build a thriving community in South Africa focused on using technology to make a positive impact on society.
facts: Annual flagship gathering, usually held in November
Rotates between Johannesburg and Cape Town

whyAttend.heading: Why Attend
benefits: Connect with a thriving network of peers that will inspire you to grow
Learn from industry experts and thought leaders
Be inspired to innovate and lead in tech
Make an impact by creating meaningful technology

image.alt: Why attend the Ummah Tech Conference — placeholder image

speakers.heading: Last year's speakers.
speakers.description: A look back at the founders, leaders and builders who shared the stage at Ummah Tech 2025.

partners.heading: Our Partners
partners.description: Proudly supported by the organisations backing the Ummah tech community.

finalCta.heading: See you in Johannesburg.
finalCta.body: Ummah Tech Conference 2026 — 7 November 2026, Johannesburg, South Africa. Save the date; ticket sales open soon.

image.alt: Ummah Tech Conference 2026 — Johannesburg, South Africa

newsletter.heading: Join the mailing list.
newsletter.description: Be the first to know. Get conference updates, speaker announcements and ticket news straight to your inbox.
newsletter.successMessage: Thanks — you're on the list. We'll be in touch with conference updates and ticket news.
